why_them: No standalone website — listed only on Fresha (phone booking) and Facebook. A well-established multi-service hair and makeup salon at a busy Dumfries road location with no owned digital presence. Missing Google discoverability, brand identity site, and price list entirely.
recommended_service: New brochure website with Fresha booking integration, price list, and Google Maps optimisation

why_them: No standalone website — Facebook-only presence with Fresha booking. The stylist is a Vivid Colour Expert and Manic Panic UK Brand Ambassador, which is a strong personal brand story that needs a proper website to sell. Currently invisible to clients searching Google.
recommended_service: Personal brand website showcasing colourwork portfolio, booking integration, and brand ambassador credentials

why_them: No standalone website found — phone-only booking listed on Fresha. In Stranraer, only one salon has full online booking (Elegance). A phone-only salon in a town with ferry traffic and tourism is leaving significant new-client acquisition on the table. No online presence to capture visiting or relocating clients.
recommended_service: New website with online booking, price list, and local SEO for Stranraer

business_name: The Cutting Edge Hair and Beauty
why_them: No standalone website — only Fresha and Facebook presence. Open 6 days a week in Stranraer town centre with no owned web presence or online booking, entirely reliant on word of mouth and directory listings. Hair and beauty combined offering ideal for a modern site.
recommended_service: New website with Fresha booking integration, services overview, and local SEO

why_them: No standalone website — Fresha-only with advanced aesthetics, teeth whitening, massages and spray tans. A multi-service business offering aesthetics with zero owned web presence beyond a booking platform profile. Without a site, they can't rank for high-value local searches like 'aesthetics Stranraer' or 'spray tan Stranraer'.
recommended_service: New website with Fresha booking, service menu for aesthetics and tanning, local SEO

why_them: Owner-operated by two professionals (hairdresser and beauty therapist) with Fresha booking but no standalone website. As the only Stranraer salon with online booking on Fresha, they clearly have digital ambition but no branded website to capture search traffic, showcase the dual service offer, or build client loyalty.
recommended_service: Branded website with embedded Fresha booking, team bios, and service showcase

why_them: No website listed on any directory — confirmed 'no website' on Big Red Directory. An established hairdresser on Newton Stewart's main street with zero online presence. Anyone searching 'hairdresser Newton Stewart' will not find them. Competitor Blackburns dominates the town digitally.
recommended_service: Entry-level website with services, price list, and Google Business profile optimisation

why_them: No website confirmed on Big Red Directory. On the same street as Marr Associates, also invisible online. Both Newton Stewart salons without websites offer a clear door-knock opportunity. Claire's being next door to Marr makes it a straightforward local pitch visit.
recommended_service: Entry-level website with gallery, booking enquiry form, and local SEO

why_them: Nearly 30 years in business with 465 five-star reviews on Fresha but no standalone website. The social proof is exceptional but trapped inside a booking platform. A dedicated site would massively amplify their reputation, capture Google search traffic for 'hairdresser Lockerbie', and reduce dependence on Fresha.
recommended_service: Website leveraging 30 years reputation, embedded booking, review showcase, price list

why_them: No standalone website found across Yell, Cylex, and Central Index. Phone-only booking in a town that now has newer competition (Browns opened Jan 2025). Without a web presence the salon is invisible to anyone who isn't already a regular customer.
recommended_service: Simple website with services, price list, and booking enquiry form

why_them: Opened January 2025 — very new salon offering hair and nail services, Fresha-only booking with no standalone website. New businesses that get a proper website early build SEO authority and brand faster. Instagram presence but no indexed, owned digital asset. Clear growth opportunity.
recommended_service: Launch website with Fresha integration, nail and hair portfolio, and local SEO from day one

location: MD Studios, 95 Irish Street, Dumfries, DG1 2NP
why_them: Website domain is completely unresolvable (DNS failure) — the site is effectively dead. A qualified Clinical Nurse Specialist (24 years NHS) offering Botox and fillers who can't be found online at all. Anyone Googling her name or 'aesthetics Dumfries' hits a dead end. Urgent rebuild needed.
recommended_service: New medical aesthetics website with before/after gallery, credentials, consent/booking system, and strong local SEO

why_them: Has a website built on Wix, but no online booking or price list visible. A registered medical spa run by a Level 7 nurse aesthetician — the clinical credibility is high but the Wix site fails to convey it. Patients expecting a premium medical spa experience arrive at a generic-looking Wix page with no pricing transparency.
recommended_service: Professional medical aesthetics website redesign with booking integration (Cliniko or Jane), treatment pricing, before/after gallery, and regulatory badges

why_them: Wix site with no visible booking system, no price list, and minimal content structure. A medical-grade clinic offering laser hair removal, tattoo removal, dermal fillers, and ear wax removal — a broad and high-value service mix that deserves a professional website. The current Wix build actively undersells the clinic's credentials and scope.
recommended_service: Medical aesthetics website rebuild with pricing pages, online consultation booking, credential display, and laser/filler SEO landing pages

why_them: Wix site flagged as 'isSEO: false' — meaning their site is actively suppressed from search engines. A 25-year-old business with a full team offering advanced treatments (DMK, electrolysis, enzyme peels) yet invisible to Google. No online booking visible on the site. Owner Jenni has the experience to fill a diary but the website is working against her.
recommended_service: SEO-optimised website rebuild with booking integration (Timely or Fresha), treatment pages with prices, and Google Business strategy

business_name: Mary Jeffrey — MJ Beauty & Skin Clinic
why_them: Shopify site (built for retail) with no appointment booking system and no treatment pricing listed — a significant friction point for a clinic established since 1974. Clients selling premium brands (Environ, Jane Iredale) and offering advanced skin treatments expect a clinical booking journey, not a product shop that also mentions treatments.
recommended_service: Treatment-focused website redesign with integrated booking (Phorest or Timely), consultation pathway, and treatment pricing pages

why_them: Custom HTML site with no online booking and no price list — significant friction in a sector where clients expect to book online and compare prices instantly. A high street Dumfries nail salon that is losing walk-ins to competitors with smoother booking journeys. The site is visually dated and not optimised for mobile conversion.
recommended_service: Modern nail salon website with Fresha/Timely booking integration, transparent price list, and gallery refresh

why_them: Facebook-only presence with 2,500+ followers but no standalone website. A busy nail and beauty salon on Friars Vennel with significant social proof trapped inside Facebook. Invisible to Google search and unable to rank for 'nail salon Dumfries' or 'spray tan Dumfries' without a website.
recommended_service: New website with booking, price list, gallery pulled from existing social content, and local SEO

why_them: Listed only on Fresha and directory sites with no standalone website found. Offers specialist services including balayage, keratin treatment, and hair extensions in Dalbeattie — services that require strong portfolio photography and online presence to attract new clients. Completely invisible to anyone searching Google for Dalbeattie hair services.
recommended_service: Portfolio-led website with colour and extension gallery, price guide, and Fresha booking embed

business_name: Violet J Professional Beauty & Holistic Therapies
why_them: No standalone website found — listed only on Fresha and Yell with no owned web presence. Offers advanced treatments including DMK paramedical facials, electrolysis, lash lifts, and holistic therapies — a premium and diverse menu that deserves a proper site. Advanced treatments at this level require a professional online presence to justify pricing.
recommended_service: Professional beauty therapist website with treatment descriptions, DMK branding, Fresha booking, and Annan local SEO

why_them: Website is built on Joomla (old CMS), pages are slow to load and the site times out — a poor user experience for a Dermalogica Expert-accredited salon with award-winning credentials. The salon's LUXlife award, Dermalogica Expert status, and wide treatment menu are completely undersold by an ageing website that doesn't rank well.
recommended_service: Modern website rebuild on WordPress or Squarespace with Fresha booking, Dermalogica branding, treatment pricing, and membership page

why_them: No standalone website — Fresha and directory listings only. An established Annan high street hairdresser with no web presence at all, operating in a town where THE Salon and Violet J also lack websites — making whoever moves first on digital a clear winner. Fresha booking shows they have some digital intent.
recommended_service: Entry-level website with services, price list, Fresha booking embed, and local SEO for Annan

why_them: Wix site for a five-star award-winning medical aesthetics clinic with 224 reviews and treatments starting at £190 — but no booking system or price list visible on the site. A premium, high-revenue clinic with the credibility to command top-tier web investment but currently held back by Wix limitations and missing patient journey features.
recommended_service: Premium medical aesthetics website with booking (Jane App or Phorest), transparent pricing, before/after gallery, and Instagram feed integration
